litigation.mdlName: In re: Paraquat Products Liability Litigation
litigation.court: U.S. District Court, Southern District of Illinois

phaseDetail: A confidential Master Settlement Agreement was signed August 4, 2025. A qualified settlement fund is being established, a lien-resolution administrator was appointed in early 2026, and in June 2026 the court ordered depositions of opt-out plaintiffs at several firms amid high opt-out rates. Bellwether trials remain vacated while the program is administered; new cases continue to transfer into the MDL.
defendants: Syngenta Crop Protection LLC / Syngenta AG

settlements.label: Master Settlement Agreement
settlements.detail: Signed August 4, 2025 (referenced in the parties' joint motion to establish a qualified settlement fund). Terms, tiers, and per-claim values are confidential — any specific payout figures circulating publicly are speculation. The court is actively supervising the opt-out process, ordering depositions of opt-out plaintiffs in June 2026.

keyDates.label: MDL-3004 established
keyDates.detail: JPML centralized federal paraquat cases before Chief Judge Nancy J. Rosenstengel in the Southern District of Illinois.

keyDates.label: Master Settlement Agreement signed
keyDates.detail: Confidential agreement referenced in the joint qualified-settlement-fund motion filed with the court.

keyDates.label: Opt-out depositions ordered
keyDates.detail: The court ordered targeted depositions of opt-out plaintiffs at three firms amid reported high opt-out rates.
